reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion, nada más la inexperiencia de quien nos atendió, habiendo derramado combustible, obvio que lo he tenido que pagar, pero a pesar de ello la recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the only issue was the inexperience of the person who helped us. Having spilled fuel, I obviously had to pay for it, but despite that, I recommend them.

reviews.comment:
Quiero felicitar la atención  excelente de las chicas de serví compra y felicitar  por siempre  pensando en el cliente hermoso espacio  en el jardín con cómodos sillones al aire libre felicitaciones

(Translated by Google)
I want to congratulate the excellent service from the Serví Compra staff and commend them for always thinking of the customer. The beautiful garden space with comfortable outdoor armchairs is wonderful. Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlcXR5Q2hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay fila para motos.  En esta zona es muy difícil conseguir combustible y esta estación prioriza a los argentinos. Muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
There's a line for motorcycles. Fuel is very difficult to find in this area, and this station prioritizes Argentinians. Very good.

reviews.comment:
Las chicas de la mañana son unas genias y las medialunas la mas ricas de iguazu...incluso mas ricas que de la panaderia

(Translated by Google)
The girls in the morning are amazing and the croissants are the best in Iguazu...even better than the ones from the bakery.

reviews.comment:
Imposible comprar allí por los turistas vecinos todos los días se llevan el combustible al estar más barato que en Brasil y paraguay

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to buy fuel there because the tourists from neighboring countries take it every day since it's cheaper than in Brazil and Paraguay.
